name: altru
description: Altru — Singapore wedding-giving platform. Static site + Cloudflare Workers backend.

scripts.db:list:local: wrangler d1 execute altru --local --command='SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type="table" ORDER BY name'
scripts.db:list:remote: wrangler d1 execute altru --remote --command='SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type="table" ORDER BY name'
